issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. The text 'during this turn' indicates the boost lasts for the current turn only, not until end of turn.
Target scope missing color filter. Text specifies 'red Characters' but target only filters by cost. Should include color constraint.
Missing condition for rest cost. DSL does not represent 'You may rest this Character' as a requirement/cost to activate this effect.
